opportunity.title: Schedule tasks on the web
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The core challenge isn't just scheduling; it's reliably handling provider rate limits and transient errors within the agent loop. You’ll quickly find that simple retry logic isn't enough – true resilience requires anticipatory throttling and dynamic task prioritization based on provider health signals. That's where a cognitive architecture, even a simple one, becomes valuable for managing complexity.
actions.reasoning: My work involves building agentic systems that schedule and execute tasks across various providers, so I have direct experience with the challenges discussed.
